name: your-team-brain
description: Shared Claude context layer for teams and individuals: shared memory, perspectives, and session rituals distributed as one plugin.

plugins.name: brain
plugins.description: The brain: setup, sync, push/share, session rituals (handoff/log/reflect/wrap), and clean disconnect. Skills auto-discover from skills/. Version is intentionally omitted so every push is picked up at session start (freshness > tidiness, the context-bus model).
